problem id: 81323d52
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  00101000 -> 01010101
  00110111 -> 01101000
  01010011 -> 10101100
  10110111 -> 01111000
  11011001 -> 10101001
  01100001 -> 11001110
  10111010 -> 01100011
  00111001 -> 01110101
  10011100 -> 00101011

query: 01011101
predicted answer: 10110001
